United States: 9 (second-highest gold count)
The next highest gold count is China with 1, followed by several nations also with 1 gold medal.
Therefore, Brazil indeed has the highest gold count, while the United States does not have the highest gold count—they are second. The Prediction Answer "brazil|no" correctly identifies that Brazil has the highest gold count (21) and implies the United States does not (with only 9).
